description: You have a LibreOffice Impress presentation at ~/Documents/Presentations/quarterly_review.odp containing 3 slides: 'Quarterly Sales Overview', 'Top Performing Products', and 'Next Quarter Priorities'. Duplicate these slides twice to create a 9-slide presentation. Prepend 'North America - ' to the titles of slides 1-3, 'Europe - ' to the titles of slides 4-6, and 'Asia-Pacific - ' to the titles of slides 7-9. Ensure all original bullet point content remains intact and save the final 9-slide presentation to ~/Documents/Presentations/quarterly_review.odp.
